---
title: "Privacy Law Roundup — June 05, 2026"
date: 2026-06-05 12:18:19 +0530
categories: [news, roundup]
tags: [dpdpa, india, privacy, global, news]
---

## India: Regulatory & Legal Developments

The Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY) has initiated the process for establishing India's crucial Data Protection Board, inviting applications for its members. This development marks a significant step towards operationalizing the Digital Personal Data Protection Act (DPDPA), 2023, as the Board will be central to its enforcement. ([Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuAFBVV95cUxOTDZxU0lVa3BOWUF1Skp3a3VZczd2WTlOYmxtZDY1VGk5WUdjdmdlUlpDUGJVN1NlSW01YnpXVk9WUzdEQ3k5Z1UyWU9US0lsTUZBZnRnaEFCdG5kQ0Z4VllOaUtDUVE4ZzVMZzVUMV8wa2g5WDVpcXFGVmZQdDZtaThHZklEZnZNbWY5dUN3Y1A4ZnljMkRyN1NHbEw2aTRGUFBxLWotbjZkSnFuUWNrNTNFUVdSSlVE0gG-AUFVX3lxTFBNLTBmMHA3aDBJSnRfU2JKWlp5ekdISzdGRThYMjhZaEVOazBPNGNaQ05Ja1VaX2tCWnpRcEY5OGQ1Mm10eXd0a3NvbGdkZlpzZVNUVzBSNHcwdFBmS1FFY1o4OU5uQ3ZZUXJYTUcyTFI3YlBXcHBLRk1CbkN2czdiREIyaV9mdGtyNVNFY0lORzZjc0ZTQ1djSHMtTTZncWc1X2lqVEtMa052ZWg3TWlOSGlEdFl0TEgwRnNNZnc?oc=5))

Separately, the Supreme Court has issued notices concerning constitutional challenges to both the DPDPA, 2023, and the recently introduced Digital Personal Data Protection Rules, 2025. These petitions raise questions about the Act's validity and its potential impact on fundamental rights, indicating ongoing legal scrutiny of India's new privacy framework. ([Source](https://news.google.?oc=5), [Source](https://news.google.?oc=5), [Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMioAFBVV95cUxNUXo3aUxwM1dVSWIzOUg4dzgtSkEtS210VFhhTkVIeS1KSHU4cHI0Vkd1enlUd0JKTmxHbTlpbDJyWVhPQmwzRWlpZnNXemZUcXRnOG51X0RYbGhYMElfejVJa2t4ZXhidnJEUkJaZVFLam50RkJubWo3VTJ2Q0YwSXAxVHk1UlhBSUsyVjdudk9RTEFraFhXT0M4UU5KNzZE?oc=5))

## India: DPDPA Implementation & Interpretation

As the DPDPA compliance deadline approaches, businesses across India are intensifying their efforts to understand and adhere to the new regulations. Various organizations are launching workshops, readiness assessments, and tools, such as automated consent management platforms, to help enterprises identify privacy gaps and implement necessary data protection measures. ([Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixgFBVV95cUxOQXU2cG85QkdIRVpkSW5MZkVaS0d5X1U5SEFFX05RZmpxYlhXRXlPV2I0RVNUeUptLW1aY19PMzlHYzZCTnlQYnF0NG9FWnRvd3F3M0UwUjZ4eUNSRU9GamFxM1ZZUVQwXy1DSjJZWlpDLTlTMWsyUWp5blFEQWFxZGpLVERmVzJVVEhON01JcEJCUkNRV1JvZG1RQ2VFTE1teExZRUFKSjlMMzZOSGN1NGNfVXN3d1ZrN3IwNXRnYnVtU0g4VFE?oc=5), [Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitgFBVV95cUxOaEVDMVFZZndJVHZJcnZvUFUtOVowTVJ2ODg3WWtpeDkyLWZVajNtZGcwTU55UkxhZ1NWX3hMU0NXMF82dXdYbW84RjZjWGdCTHVHMHNjN2dfUEF4YXFIclhTcHBqZDhfbkNrcVRVMlM3TVkyY3c5OXRmZmxHRXB3UDU5RmRaQzFDVGttREFsbVJsa3R3dVJ2QndITWI1ZVRsRHZYZHBqZWFCQXpyZmk2QmlNdndzdw?oc=5), [Source](https://news.google.?oc=5), [Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirwFBVV95cUxOa08yMkJwNUtZZWV2Y3lWOVczQ1QwR2JkYXY2YmtBTUNwN2xzTWs3WHV0SWcyVm41RmEyclVsQjJUM3UwSDZtZ0N3anhHMm1xcmlobVJQVXlPME9lNUxWc3ZubUNXSTVtNjV3WlVmS3hOS3BmTVJ0Q1JMSGJ2M2ZsdElmUU02LXhCTjVfSjlWQlhxTHktcUk1bkdCZWczemFkakJMWlJ5NjJpamlMUDNR?oc=5), [Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirAFBVV95cUxOMml1b3pwZ0s5RWU0S3dUa1dZdC14NGFaR0JWLWpfSGlDQWVTbmJ6bW5FM293YXJGQ2FNMnFQamtGd2RVejNtdVBDTW5vMWRQN1lSSkgzZTBweVVaelFmeVNEYVlIdUxrSWxHMDFMTENqd0xzX0IxV0huZ0JrVTZyeHJFbjBSQThMY1ZkRl9fZ0RWWVk0cUE3a2xpYUd3cEgxMzIzT2oyS3RyQ2Z0?oc=5), [Source](https://news.google.google.?oc=5), [Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiwAFBVV95cUxNSGZqclBxSHNKemF6cU0yamhsOGZRR2dwNTBhTUdyUkhCbTAtc05OSW5Rdm1yYlJRd2NJUnY2bUdBX1lUci1FSDdJUjJaRE1MZTlwNFZ5eVRPeTdRY1AwdjB0SEltZlNKdjlNQU9hZTZtODZnQjRka3BKdTVhdlpJRTNhUk9CZWlaSjgxNGQ5
